command: bash -lc 'pnpm -s run prepare >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pnpm -s run typecheck & pid1=$!; pnpm -s run build & pid2=$!; wait $pid1; ec1=$?; wait $pid2; ec2=$?; echo "__EXIT_TYPECHECK__=$ec1"; echo "__EXIT_BUILD__=$ec2"; test $ec1 -eq 0 -a $ec2 -eq 0'
notes: ERROR  ENOENT: no such file or directory, unlink '/Users/maxi/nuxt/saas/.data/db/queries/content-database-001.sql'
